title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Orient Electric

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Orient Electric
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
